queue.title: Add variety-analyzer unit tests
queue.description: (added ~s1715): engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs has no dedicated test file. It handles edge cases (empty traces, mixed string/object platforms_engaged, single-session windows) that are worth testing directly rather than only through hook integration. Would also cover the concentration threshold logic and alert-file output.

outcome.note: 31 tests across 6 suites covering all exported functions. Added conditional exports with isMain guard to preserve standalone script behavior.

queue.title: Add brainstorm cleanup regression test
queue.description: (promoted R#303 from brainstorming ~s1701): 44-brainstorm-cleanup.sh had two bugs (## Ideas section not matched, --- separator resetting section state) that went undetected for 40+ sessions. Create a test with a mock BRAINSTORMING.md containing items in both ## Ideas and ## Evolution Ideas sections, plus --- separators, to catch regressions in the retirement logic.

outcome.note: Already completed by wq-786 (commit 927e1914). Test file brainstorm-cleanup.test.mjs exists with 8 tests covering all regression cases. All pass.

queue.title: Recover Colony credentials or reduce picker weight
queue.description: A#184 finding: s1717 E session skipped The Colony (picker-mandated) due to expired JWT and lost api_key. Same pattern as previous Moltchan (wq-788) and 4claw (wq-793) credential losses. Either recover credentials via re-registration or reduce picker weight to avoid wasting E session slots.

outcome.note: Re-registered as 'moltbot' on The Colony (original moltbook/terminalcraft accounts had lost api_keys, no recovery endpoint). API key saved to colony-credentials.json + ~/.colony-key. JWT refresh hook (14-token-refresh.sh) verified end-to-end. Account registry updated.

queue.title: Add tests for remaining 5 lib_modules (prompt-sections, intel-pipeline, orchestrator-cli)
queue.description: d071 revised plan: 5 lib_modules remain uncovered — a-prompt-sections.mjs, b-prompt-sections.mjs, r-prompt-sections.mjs, intel-pipeline.mjs, orchestrator-cli.mjs. These are the primary remaining d071 deliverable. Prompt-sections are similar enough to batch (1 test file with 3 describe blocks). Intel-pipeline and orchestrator-cli need individual tests.

queue.title: Add safe-fetch.mjs unit tests (d071 lib_modules coverage)
queue.description: safe-fetch.mjs has no test file. Now that it has DNS error detection (wq-790), tests should cover: SSRF blocking, timeout handling, dns_failed error type, connection_error type, successful fetch, fetchStatus/fetchBody helpers. Part of d071 lib_modules remaining coverage.

queue.title: Fix duplicate pattern IDs in knowledge base
queue.description: R#304 finding: knowledge_prune remove/validate operations match the first pattern with a given ID, but duplicate IDs exist (p028, p029, p030 each had 2 entries from different sources). This caused collateral damage — 2 valid patterns (p028 'Granular permission layering', p029 'Task dependency tracking') were removed instead of their stale duplicates. Fix: either deduplicate IDs in the knowledge store (renumber stale entries) or update knowledge_prune to accept a disambiguator (source, title substring).

queue.title: Add Colony JWT refresh to E session prehook
queue.description: Colony JWTs expire every 24h. The 14-token-refresh.sh pre-session hook refreshes on session start, but if an E session starts >23h after last refresh, the JWT may expire mid-session. Add a Colony-specific freshness check to 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh that validates token expiry before platform selection, similar to credential checks for other platforms.
